void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=module-rights-evidence-template-id&lbpmTmpId=module-rights-evidence-lbpm-id" fdId="module-rights-evidence-process-id"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="开始节点"/> <draftNode id="N2" name="起草节点"/> <endNode id="N3" name="结束节点"/> </nodes> <lines> <line id="L1" startNodeId="N1" endNodeId="N2"/> <line id="L2" startNodeId="N2" endNodeId="N3"/> </lines> </process>
